title: GSG
description: GSG is a lightweight gameplay enhancement mod that expands Minecraft with new equipment and progression-focused content. It adds balanced tools, weapons, and armor designed to fit naturally into vanilla survival without affecting performance.
body:
About GSG Mod 

GSG MOD is a survival-focused Minecraft mod that expands the game with new ores, armors, tools, and progression-based content.

The mod is designed to enhance the vanilla survival experience while keeping balance and performance in mind.

All content included in this mod is original and created by me.

No copyrighted assets, music, or content from other mods or games are used.

🔹 Main Features

New custom ores

New armor sets

New tools and equipment

Survival progression focused gameplay

Balanced for vanilla-style survival

Lightweight and stable

🔹 Dependencies (Required Mods)

⚠️ This mod requires the following mods to work properly:

Curios API

GeckoLib

Make sure these mods are installed before launching the game.

🔹 Compatibility

Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

Mod Loader: Forge

Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer

🔹 Installation Guide

Install Minecraft Forge for the correct version.

Install Curios API and GeckoLib.

Download GSG MOD.

Place all .jar files into the mods folder.

Launch Minecraft.

🔹 Notes

This mod does not include shaders or OptiFine.

This mod does not modify vanilla world files.

Safe to use in existing worlds unless stated otherwise.

🔹 License & Usage

You may use this mod in modpacks.

Reuploading this mod or claiming it as your own is not allowed.

Do not redistribute modified versions without permission.

🔹 Credits

Mod created by GamerSonGokuYT

Powered by Minecraft Forge
